_comment: TODO: Replace placeholder athletes with real partnered athletes once briefs and portraits are signed off. Keep portraits vertical 4:5, documentary tone, muted colour. Quotes must be approved in writing by the athlete. Image paths point to /athletes/<slug>.jpg — drop files into the /athletes/ folder.

athletes.name: Athlete Name One
athletes.quote: I trained on it for an entire build phase before I raced on it. By the time I hit the line in Cairns I'd done forty long sessions on the same fuel. Nothing surprised me.

athletes.name: Athlete Name Two
athletes.quote: Two ingredients. That's the whole conversation. I stopped reading labels and started training.
